extra.aggregation_note: Parity row uses the R etwfe default no-ivar fixed-effect structure (StatsPAI panel=False) and sp.etwfe_emfx(weighting='treated'), which averages cohort-time marginal effects over treated post-period observations like etwfe::emfx(type='simple'). Point estimates match to machine precision; SEs retain a fixest/marginaleffects delta-method convention difference.
